summary: BC Posting Pattern Analyzer (Phase 1) testing completed. All 25 tests passed (17 posting patterns + 8 derived state regression). Verified: (1) posting_pattern_analyzer.py module loads with all functions importable, (2) business_central_service.py has get_posted_purchase_invoices and get_purchase_invoice_lines methods, (3) posting_patterns router registered at /api/posting-patterns, (4) GET /api/posting-patterns/status returns confidence distribution, (5) GET /api/posting-patterns/vendor/TUMALOC returns 'not_analyzed' (expected - BC API unavailable on preview), (6) GET /api/posting-patterns/learning-proof/TUMALOC returns 'NOT LEARNED' (expected), (7) ap_auto_post_service loads posting_profile and attaches suggested_posting_template, (8) knowledge-seed/learning-proof/{vendor_id} regression check passed.
critical_code_review_comments: Code review confirms all posting pattern features are properly implemented:
1. posting_pattern_analyzer.py: analyze_vendor_posting_patterns, build_all_vendor_posting_profiles, get_posting_profile_for_vendor functions present
2. business_central_service.py: get_posted_purchase_invoices (lines 505-555) and get_purchase_invoice_lines (lines 557-581) methods added
4. main.py: posting_patterns_router imported and registered at /api/posting-patterns (line 93, 165)
5. ap_auto_post_service.py: posting_profile loaded via get_posting_profile_for_vendor (lines 133-137), suggested_posting_template attached (lines 182-185)

success_rate.backend: 100% (25/25 tests passed: 17 posting patterns + 8 derived state regression)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BC Posting Pattern Analyzer Phase 1 fully tested. Key endpoints verified: /api/posting-patterns/status (returns confidence distribution), /api/posting-patterns/vendor/{vendor_no} (returns profile or 'not_analyzed'), /api/posting-patterns/learning-proof/{vendor_no} (returns proof or 'NOT LEARNED'). NOTE: BC API calls (get_posted_purchase_invoices, get_purchase_invoice_lines) will fail on preview environment due to placeholder BC credentials - this is expected. Full BC integration test should happen on production server (http://4.204.41.190:8080). The /api/posting-patterns/analyze/{vendor_no} and /api/posting-patterns/analyze-top endpoints require BC API access and were not tested.
